chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُوَاقِعُ امْرَأَتَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَقْضِيَ مَنَاسِكَهُ أَوْ مُحِلٍّ يَقَعُ عَلَى مُحْرِمَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 103 – The one in Ihraam falls upon his wife before he fulfils his rituals, or the one free from Ihraam falls upon a woman in Ihraam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/348)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/348)
text: مَعْنَى يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَهُمَا أَيْ لَا يَخْلُوَانِ وَ أَنْ يَكُونَ مَعَهُمَا ثَالِثٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad, from Aban Bin Usman,

(It has been narrated) raising it to one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘The meaning of ‘effecting separation between the two)’, i.e.. They both should not be together without there happening to be a third person along with them’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad from Aban ibn ‘Uthman in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, ‘The meaning of separating them is that they must not stay together without a third person being with them.’”
